description: Composition Pink and white printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar and V-neck, hakoba work along the yoke and back chest, three-quarter sleeves with pin tuck and hakoba detailing, piping at the cuffs with mild pleats and a rounded vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash in cold water Dry clean only Classic patterning on contemporary styles by aneri creates this kurta for women. Timelessly chic, this piece will never go out of style. Wear it with tonal leggings and pumps for ethnic glam or with form fitting denims and flats for a casual do. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
